[n]

record_types.name: INTEN_COMPARE_Field
INTEN_Register

fields.name: Reserved_12_24
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event RTCOMPARESYNC

fields.name: Reserved_26_26
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event PWMPERIODEND

fields.name: Reserved_28_28
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event PWMREADY

fields.name: PWMREADY
fields.description: Enable or disable interrupt for event CLKOUTREADY

record_types.name: INTENCLR_COMPARE_Field
INTENCLR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_12_24
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event RTCOMPARESYNC

fields.name: Reserved_26_26
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event PWMPERIODEND

fields.name: Reserved_28_28
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event PWMREADY

fields.name: PWMREADY
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. Write '1' to disable interrupt for event CLKOUTREADY

record_types.name: INTENSET_COMPARE_Field
INTENSET_Register

fields.name: Reserved_12_24
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event RTCOMPARESYNC

fields.name: Reserved_26_26
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event PWMPERIODEND

fields.name: Reserved_28_28
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event PWMREADY

fields.name: PWMREADY
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall set (set to one) the corresponding bit in
the field. Write '1' to enable interrupt for event CLKOUTREADY

record_types.name: INTERVAL_Register
INTPEND_COMPARE_Field
INTPEND_Register

fields.name: Reserved_12_24
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event RTCOMPARESYNC

fields.name: Reserved_26_26
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event PWMPERIODEND

fields.name: Reserved_28_28
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event PWMREADY

fields.name: PWMREADY
fields.description: Read-only. Read pending status of interrupt for event CLKOUTREADY
